# transferMode

**Instance Property**

Determines how the contents are saved by the delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
var transferMode: IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

The possible values are described in [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode].
